name: Asset Optimization
description: Optimize reconstructed photogrammetry assets for real-time XR performance in Unity and standalone VR devices.

steps.title: Import and Inspect the Reconstruction Mesh
steps.description: Import the reconstructed photogrammetry asset into Blender and prepare it for optimization.
instructions: Launch Blender and import the reconstructed OBJ or FBX mesh exported from Meshroom.
Inspect the reconstructed model for floating geometry, disconnected fragments, holes, stretched polygons, and non-manifold edges.
Delete unnecessary geometry and artifacts generated during photogrammetry reconstruction.
Verify that the model scale approximately matches real-world proportions in meters.
Apply object transforms using Ctrl+A and apply location, rotation, and scale.
Recenter the object origin so future placement inside Unity becomes easier.
Save the Blender project file before beginning optimization operations.

steps.title: Optimize Mesh Geometry
steps.description: Reduce polygon count while preserving the overall shape and visual quality of the monument.
instructions: Select the mesh object and add a Decimate modifier in Blender.
Use Collapse mode for general polygon reduction and begin with a ratio between 0.3 and 0.5 depending on mesh complexity.
Continuously inspect the silhouette and surface details while adjusting the decimation ratio.
Prioritize preserving important architectural details and recognizable monument features.
Apply the modifier once a suitable balance between quality and performance is achieved.
Recalculate normals if shading artifacts appear after optimization.
Aim for significantly reduced triangle counts suitable for standalone XR devices such as Meta Quest.

steps.title: Optimize Textures and Export Final Asset
steps.description: Prepare optimized textures and export the final XR-ready asset for Unity integration.
instructions: Inspect all exported texture maps and identify unnecessarily large texture resolutions.
Reduce excessively large textures to more performance-friendly resolutions such as 2K or 1K where appropriate.
Compress texture formats while preserving important visual surface details.
Ensure UV maps remain correctly aligned after optimization.
Verify that texture assignments remain intact on the optimized mesh.
Export the optimized model as FBX for Unity compatibility.
Export all optimized textures alongside the FBX asset into the workflow output folder.
Ensure the exported FBX maintains correct scale, orientation, and material assignments.
checklist: Files transferred to workflow output folder
